title: LMNT Voice
description: Schema for a voice object in the LMNT Speech API, representing a system or user-cloned voice available for text-to-speech synthesis.

name.description: Human-readable display name of the voice.

state.description: Current lifecycle state of the voice.

gender.description: Gender label associated with the voice.

starred.description: Whether the voice is starred/favorited by the user.

tags.description: List of tags associated with the voice.

preview_url.description: URL to an audio preview of the voice.
